title: teams — realtime broadcast channels
description: Three broadcast channel families for live UI updates. Tenant-level channel for cross-branch admin dashboards; team-scoped channels for roster + trial live updates on the team detail screen; per-team member/trial streams feed live-updating rosters + trial pipelines. Reverb driver (Laravel Reverb) is the default transport; the notifications module handles fanout.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.teams
channels.description: Tenant-wide team + roster + trial + event-team stream. Sink for admin dashboards showing cross-branch activity.
channels.notes: Payload is trimmed to non-confidential fields (see data-classes.json). Trial rejections broadcast the fact-of-decision only, never the reason (anti-discrimination inference protection).

channels.name: team.{teamId}.members
channels.description: Team-scoped roster activity. Powers the live-roster widget on the team detail screen — a coach sees new members appear + status changes as they happen.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND (teams.view for team_id OR platform_admin)
channels.notes: Payload is trimmed to (member_id, role_on_team, status, joined_at) — never notes or metadata. Coach's evaluation notes stay off the wire.

channels.name: team.{teamId}.trials
channels.description: Team-scoped trial pipeline. Powers the trial-pipeline board on the team detail screen — a coach sees new trials appear + decisions in real time.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND (trials.view for team_id OR platform_admin)
channels.notes: Payload trimmed to (trial_id, trialist_display_name, status, starts_at, decided_at). No evaluation_notes / decision_notes on the wire.
